01 — Background

About me

Hey, I'm Priyanshu Dev — a developer and engineering student from India. I'm pursuing Electronics Engineering at Asansol Engineering College, which gives me a natural interest in how things work at the hardware level.

I love building things — whether it's a clean web interface, an automated system, or diving deep into how operating systems and networks actually function. I'm fascinated by system design, AI automation, and the full stack from silicon to software.

Currently exploring Java & Spring Boot, leveling up my DSA, and working on projects that I'll be sharing soon.
